explanations.11: The [php] key tells VS Code these settings apply only to PHP files, not all file types.
explanations.19: This setting automatically saves your file whenever you click away from the editor to another window or tab.
explanations.22: This tells the PHP formatter where to find the configuration file that defines your code style rules.
explanations.24: This is the path to the actual PHP formatter program that will run to clean up your code.
explanations.28: PSR12 is a standard set of PHP formatting rules; this line uses those built-in rules instead of custom ones.
explanations.34: This installs the junstyle.php-cs-fixer extension so VS Code can use that formatter.
